summary: First-finish smoke test of Bible Bio X MVP. Backend auth, Bible endpoints, mood save, and SSE streaming (prayer) verified via curl. Frontend login, Today view (greeting, mood grid, Verse of Day, Save), Explore grid with 8 tool cards, Verse Lookup end-to-end, and Prayer streaming end-to-end all working. Settings page and bottom navigation functional.
passed: POST /api/auth/login (admin@biblebio.com) returns 200 with user JSON and sets HttpOnly access_token + refresh_token cookies
GET /api/auth/me returns authenticated user after cookie login
GET /api/bible/verse?reference=John+3:16 returns John 3:16 text (World English Bible)
POST /api/mood accepts {mood, emoji} and returns 'Mood saved'
POST /api/generate/prayer streams SSE (data: chunks) tokens progressively from OpenAI
Login UI: form submit routes to /app and Today view
Today UI: greeting, 5 mood emojis, VOD card render; mood click accepted; Save Verse triggers 'Verse saved!' toast
Explore UI shows all 8 tool cards (Bio, Lookup, Explain, Sermon, Parable, Devo, Theology, Kids)
Verse Lookup tool end-to-end: enter 'John 3:16' -> shows correct verse text and translation
Prayer tool end-to-end: streaming visibly progressive (body length grew 116->1486 over 8s)
Bottom navigation (4 tabs: Home, Study, Prayer, Settings) navigate correctly and highlight active state
Settings page shows profile (Admin, admin@biblebio.com, ADMIN role) and Logout

failed.issue: Tool cards on Explore use short labels ('Bio', 'Lookup', ...) instead of full names ('Character Bio', 'Verse Lookup'). Not a bug per se, but there are no data-testid attributes on tool cards or nav items which slows automated testing and makes label-based selectors ambiguous (e.g., 'Bio' text also appears in other contexts).
failed.evidence: page.click('text=Bio') failed to navigate from /app/explore; had to rely on positional nav-button indices for bottom nav.

failed.issue: Could not confirm theme toggle actually toggles theme in this smoke test - clicking the 'Theme / Dark' region did not change document.documentElement.className. Needs targeted verification with a proper toggle control (no data-testid='theme-toggle' present).
failed.evidence: html class before='' after='' after clicking; no visible toggle switch was detected.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to tool cards (e.g., tool-character-bio, tool-verse-lookup, ...), bottom nav items (nav-home, nav-study, nav-prayer, nav-settings), theme toggle (theme-toggle), and generate buttons (generate-btn) to make full E2E testing reliable.
Verify theme toggle in Settings actually toggles class on documentElement/body and persists to localStorage; add data-testid='theme-toggle' on the interactive control.
